prerequisites.story: next-pwa plugin configured, service worker generated, runtime caching strategies
PWA analytics tracking for installs and offline usage

key-files.file: PWA manifest with name, icons, display, shortcuts — needs lang, scope, id, icon separation
Metadata export with manifest link, theme color, apple web app config, viewport
next-pwa plugin with 11 runtime caching strategies — needs fallbacks config
Main layout wrapper — integration point for install prompt component

patterns.pattern: Use 'use client' directive for browser-API-dependent components
UI components from @chakra-ui/react with responsive props
Persist client state in localStorage (sidebar collapse, visit count)

new-files.file: Standalone offline fallback page with app branding
Smart install banner with visit counting
Badge API utility for insights count
